chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1860 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing of case For hearing of main case. 25-03-2025 Mr. Waseemuddin, advocate for the petitioner. Under instructions learned counsel does not press this petition, which is dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
